title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zoho Corporation Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
